validation.name-length: Username must be at least 2 characters.
validation.password-length: Password must be at least 6 characters.

api-errors.user-not-found: User with this email doesn't exist.
api-errors.duplicate-user: User with this email already exists.

forgot-password.explanation: Enter your email address and we will send you a new password.

account.logout-confirm-msg: Are you sure you want to leave? You will need to sign in again to access your account.

delete-account.header: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
delete-account.explanation: This action is permanent and cannot be reversed.

where.title: Where do you want to travel?
where.subtitle: Choose a destination or be flexible

when.title: When do you want to travel?
when.subtitle: Choose a specific period or the preferred months

how-long.title: How long are you planning to stay?
how-long.subtitle: Choose how many days you want to spend on your trip

interests.title: What are you interested in?
interests.subtitle: Choose the categories of activities you are interested in

preferences.title: Any other preferences?
preferences.subtitle: Tell me more about your travel plans
preferences.example: ex: I prefer 4-star hotels, I’d like to stay away from tourist traps, I’m interested in local festivals...

destinations.title: Suggested for You
destinations.subtitle: Pick a destination that inspires you

attractions.title: Select Attractions
attractions.subtitle: Choose at least one place you would love to see

fallback.country-destinations: Here are some top rated destinations from
fallback.not-found: No country with this name was found:
fallback.other-suggestions: Here are some other destinations that match your vibe.
fallback.location-not-found: No destination with this name was found:

bot.welcome-message: Hi there! I’m TravelBuddy, your personal guide to the world. Where are we heading next? I can help you find destinations, discover local gems, or plan your perfect itinerary. Just tell me what you’re looking for!
bot.subtitle: TravelBuddy will know the details of your trip and adapt the answers.
